SETT CONF: ASS'D DEPT. 608. JUDGE: TOMAR MASON; CLERK: DAN MACDUFF; REPORTER: KAREN FARNSWORTH. PLTF APPEARS WITH COUNSEL BARRON MILLER; DEFT APPEARS IN PRO PER. THE CASE SETTLES AS FOLLOWS: JUDGMENT OF POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES, AGAINST DEFENDANTS, STAYED UNTIL 11/9/01. PLTFS RESERVE RIGHT TO BRING A SEPARATE ACTION FOR DAMAGES AND ATTORNEY FEES.
